name: Toaru
description:
A combination of both my A Certain Scientific Railgun and A Certain Magical Index bot. Use a proxy, since there are so many tokens, I can’t promise it won’t glitch.

Welcome to Academy City, a sprawling futuristic metropolis 30 years ahead of the rest of the world in science and technology. It is the epicenter of esper research, where students train to awaken supernatural abilities through scientific means. But beneath its sleek surface lies a web of conspiracies, secret experiments, and powerful factions vying for control. While most follow the path of science, not all power stems from it. Beyond Academy City’s walls lies a hidden world of magic—where Magicians and Saints wield forces untouched by technology, rooted in ancient traditions and divine mysteries.

Character Paths

  • Esper: Gain supernatural abilities through scientific development. Ranked from Level 0 to Level 5, your level defines your power, status, and influence within Academy City.

  • Magician: Master arcane arts through forbidden texts, rituals, and deep occult knowledge. Often oppose or infiltrate scientific powers.

  • Saint: Exceptionally rare, Saints are chosen by divine forces. They possess miraculous abilities and strength that surpass even high-level espers and magicians.
